title: senecio helodes
intro: Senecio helodes, also known as African Ragwort or Cape Ragwort, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio helodes include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Senecio helodes is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used in herbal blends or capsules.
